data_text_barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C426C: I'm very interested in big {STR_VAR_1}.\nThe bigger the better.\pHuh? Do you have a {STR_VAR_1}?\nP-p-please, show me!
data_text_barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C42CE: Oh, my gosh, this is a big one!\nThis is a grand {STR_VAR_1}!\pThanks for showing me.\nThis is my thanks!
data_text_barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C4360: Hmm... I've seen a bigger {STR_VAR_1}\nthan this one.
data_text_barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C438C: Oh, now this is quite something...\nBut it's not a {STR_VAR_1}!
data_text_barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C43C2: You don't have a big {STR_VAR_1}?\nThat's too bad...\pIf you get a big {STR_VAR_1},\nplease come show me.
